modelUse: Justifies low unenhanced Tc baseline, bounded enhanced local Tc population, and strong lattice sensitivity.
modelBoundary: Do not convert hydrostatic pressure directly into local uniaxial strain in the lithographic stressor geometry.
implementedHook: Tc baseline/enhanced bounds and correlated mechanical/Raman proxy fields.
notes: Use to bound local Tc ranges and motivate mechanical coupling, not to infer a unique Tc(epsilon) law.

citationLabel: MoTe2 point-contact spectroscopy / gap-ratio prior, arXiv:1805.02470
modelUse: Provides a narrow prior for alpha_gap = 2 Delta / kB Tc near 3.7 +/- 0.4.
modelBoundary: Do not claim the local strained domains have directly measured gaps unless device-specific spectroscopy exists.
implementedHook: v7.4.6/v7.5 alpha_gap sweep and gap-derived Ic scale.
notes: This prior narrows alpha_gap but should remain shared/global, not link-by-link.

citationLabel: Ambegaokar and Baratoff tunnel-junction IcRn relation
modelUse: Constrains tunnel-like weak-link Ic Rn(T) instead of allowing independent arbitrary Ic per link.
modelBoundary: Use as a tunnel/crack-like hypothesis; continuous intraflake regions may be SNS/constriction-like instead.
implementedHook: v7.4.6/v7.5 AB-like IcRn scale for crack/tunnel-like links.
notes: Good for low-transparency links; SNS/constriction links should use a separate normalized class factor.
